questions.question: Who is set to succeed Admiral Karambir Singh as the Chief of Naval Staff?
questions.explanation: Vice Admiral R Hari Kumar would be succeeding Admiral Karambir Singh as the Chief of Naval Staff, since Admiral Karambir Singh is retiring from the Naval Services on 30th November 2021. Presently, R Hari Kumar is the Flag Officer Commanding-in-Chief of the Indian Navy’s Western Naval Command.

questions.question: “Retail Direct Scheme” and “Integrated Ombudsman Scheme” have been launched by which organisation?

options.label: B
options.text: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority

options.label: D
options.text: Securities and Exchange Board of India

questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India’s “Retail Direct Scheme” and “Integrated Ombudsman Scheme” has been launched and dedicated to the nation by Prime Minister Narendra Modi. Under the Retail Direct Scheme, retail investors can buy and sell government securities online. The Integrated Ombudsman Scheme helps improve the grievance redressal mechanism on customer complaints.

questions.question: Which country formed a Parliamentary Friendship Association with India recently?
questions.explanation: Sri Lanka formed India-Sri Lanka Parliamentary Friendship group, with senior members of Lankan parliament to promote bilateral ties with India. The country had earlier decided to buy fertiliser from India after rejecting the Chinese fertiliser consignment. The India- Sri Lanka Parliamentary Friendship Association for the 9th Parliament of Sri Lanka was established recently.

questions.question: Which company has launched new smaller dish to connect with satellites in low Earth orbit?
questions.explanation: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk’s satellite Internet service Starlink has launched a new smaller and rectangular dish to connect with satellite constellation in low Earth orbit. It is a thinner and lighter-weight option than the circular dish that Starlink beta users have been testing over the last year. Starlink, SpaceX’s satellite internet project, aims to launch about 12,000 satellites into low Earth orbit where they can provide broadband internet coverage to people on the ground.

questions.question: What is India’s retail inflation rate, measured by the Consumer Price Index (CPI), for the month of October?
questions.explanation: India’s retail inflation rate, measured by the Consumer Price Index (CPI), rose to 4.48 percent in the month of October 2021, compared to at 4.35 percent at that of September 2021. This data was released by the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI). There was a light increase in retail inflation in October due to a rise in food prices. CPI has been below the Reserve Bank of India’s six percent margin, for the fourth month in a row.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry manages the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA)?
questions.explanation: Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA) comes under the administrative control of the Union Corporate affairs Ministry. The Government has recently simplified the claim settlement process under the IEFPA. It includes changes like allowing self-attestation of documents instead of the current requirement of notarisation. IEPFA has been set up for administration of investor funds under the Companies law.

questions.question: The recently inaugurated Rani Kamalapati station is located in which state?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated the revamped Rani Kamalapati station, India’s ‘most-modern’ railway station, in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The railway station previously known as Habibganj, has been renamed after Gond queen Rani Kamalapati of Ginnorgarh. The station has been redeveloped at a cost of around Rs 450 crore in the Public-Private Partnership (PPP) mode. It has been revamped as a hub for integrated multi-modal transport and also as a green building.

questions.question: Where is the three-day ‘Rashtra Raksha Samarpan Parv’ held?
questions.explanation: The Defence Ministry’s celebration event named Rashtra Raksha Samarpan Parv’ is held at Jhansi as a part of the Azadi Ka Amrit Mahaotsav’ celebrations in India. Under this event, the Prime Minister would launch and dedicate multiple initiatives of the Defence sector to the nation and the event aims to provide thrust to ‘Make in India for Defence sector’.

questions.question: Checkmate, a new stealth aircraft seen in the news, is being developed by which country?
questions.explanation: Russia is developing its second stealth fighter jet after the twin-engine Su-57 Felon. ‘Su-75 Checkmate’, the new stealth aircraft is also known as the Light Tactical Aircraft (LTC). The aircraft has been developed by the United Aircraft Corporation, which is a part of state defense and technology conglomerate, Rostec. Checkmate is a fifth-generation light fighter jet, which will take its maiden flight in 2023.

questions.question: Which Indian state has seen 563 per cent rise in Capex Growth in the first Half of current fiscal year?
questions.explanation: In the first six months of the current financial year, Uttar Pradesh marked a 563 per cent rise in its capex (capital expenditure) growth. There was a wide variation of capex growth by the top ten states in terms of tax devolution. Odisha saw its capex grow by just 12.58 per cent year-on-year and Andhra Pradesh saw a fall of 30 per cent in capex.
